subcodes.first_line: O thou who art quickened by the breaths of God's love, unloose thy tongue in divine remembrance and soar in the soul-refreshing atmosphere of His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بنفحات محبت الله زبان بذکر الهی باز کن و در فضای جانفزای عرفان بیاد حق
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
